description: Add Playwright and route/Lambda regression coverage for the reordered flow: anonymous get-started/privacy acknowledgement, anonymous precheck with no browser/local persistence, account creation/sign-in binding of precheck context, telehealth/platform acceptance before MDI, MDI patient profile and questionnaire, applicable medication disclosure after questionnaire, and no local questionnaire answer retention. Include stale/expired token recovery and ineligible precheck cases.
title: E2E coverage for anonymous precheck staged consent flow
